category_sources: source_facts.description says Hy is a Lisp dialect embedded in Python; official hylang.org homepage describes Hy as a multi-paradigm programming language in the Lisp family.
display_name_sources: Official hylang.org homepage heading is "Hy"; source_facts.name is hy.
docs_sources: Official hylang.org homepage links to Documentation, redirected to the Hy 1.3.0 manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official hylang.org homepage links GitHub to https://github.com/hylang/hy; repository README lists Code as the same URL.
tags_sources: Official hylang.org homepage describes Hy as Lisp embedded in Python and mentions REPL/program execution; GitHub topics include python, compiler, metaprogramming, macros, hy, lisps.
